subject: fix(theme): replace manual banner tints with DaisyUI alert component
body:
Update banner (bg-success/10) and large graph warning (bg-warning/10)
now use DaisyUI alert alert-soft component class instead of manual
opacity tints. Provides proper themed backgrounds, consistent with
other alert usages across the app.

Tags: theme, daisyui, alert, banners
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch

title: replace manual banner tints with DaisyUI alert component
